segments.text: CARL: Hi, come and take a seat.
segments.translation: 卡尔：嗨，进来坐吧。

segments.text: JULIE: Thank you.
segments.translation: 朱莉：谢谢。

segments.text: CARL: My name's Carl Rogers and l'm one of the doctors here at the Total Health Clinic.
segments.translation: 卡尔：我叫卡尔·罗杰斯，是全健康诊所的医生。

segments.text: So I understand this is your first visit to the clinic?
segments.translation: 这是你第一次来诊所吗？

segments.text: JULIE: Yes, it is.
segments.translation: 朱莉：是的。

segments.text: CARL: OK, well I hope you'll be very happy with the service you receive here.
segments.translation: 卡尔：好吧，我希望你对这里的服务感到满意。

segments.text: So if it's aright with you I'll take a few details to help me give you the best possible service.
segments.translation: 所以，如果可以的话，我会询问你一些细节来帮助我给你提供最好的服务。

segments.text: JULIE: Sure.
segments.translation: 朱莉：当然。

segments.text: CARL: So can I check first of all that we have the correct personal details for you?
segments.translation: 卡尔：那么我能先核对一下个人信息是否正确吗？

segments.text: So your full name is Julie Anne Garcia?
segments.translation: 你的全名是朱莉·安妮·加西亚吗？

segments.text: JULIE: That's correct.
segments.translation: 朱莉：是的。

segments.text: CARL: Perfect. And can I have a contact phone number?
segments.translation: 卡尔：好的。你能给我个联系电话吗？

segments.text: CARL: OK, and then can I just check that we have the correct date of birth?
segments.translation: 卡尔：好的，那我们再看看出生日期是否正确呢？

segments.text: JULIE: October tenth, 1992.
CARL: Oh, I actually have 1991, I'll just correct that now.
segments.translation: 卡尔：哦，实际上我这里记的是1991年，我现在就改过来。

segments.text: Right, so that's all good.
segments.translation: 好的，这些信息都正确了。

segments.text: Now I just need just a few more personal details... do you have an occupation, either full-time or part-time?
segments.translation: 现在我还需要一些你的个人资料……你有全职或兼职的工作吗？

segments.text: JULIE: Yes, I work full-time in Esterhazy's - you know, the restaurant chain.
segments.translation: 朱莉：是的，我在Esterhazy餐厅全职工作，就是那个连锁餐厅。

segments.text: I started off as a waitress there a few years ago and l'm a manager now.
segments.translation: 几年前我开始在那里当服务员，现在我是经理。

segments.text: CARL: Oh I know them, yeah, they're down on 114th Street, aren't they?
segments.translation: 卡尔：噢我知道那家餐厅，在114号街上对吗？

segments.text: JULIE: That's right.
segments.translation: 朱莉：没错。

segments.text: CARL: Yeah, I've been there a few times.
segments.translation: 卡尔：嗯，我去过几次。

segments.text: I just love their salads.
segments.translation: 我很喜欢他们的沙拉。

segments.text: JULIE: That's good to hear.
segments.translation: 朱莉：听你这么说真好。

segments.text: CARL: Right, so one more thing I need to know before we talk about why you're here, Julie, and that's the name of your insurance company.
segments.translation: 卡尔：对了，在我们讨论你为什么来这里之前，我还需要知道一件事，朱莉，就是你的保险公司的名字。

segments.text: JULIE: It's Cawley Life Insurance, that's C-A-W-L-E-Y.
segments.translation: 朱莉：是考利人寿保险，拼写是C-A-W-L-E-Y。

segments.text: CARL: Excellent, thank you so much.
segments.translation: 卡尔：好的，谢谢你。

segments.text: CARL: Now Julie, let's look at how we can help you.
segments.translation: 卡尔：朱莉，让我来看看能帮到你什么。

segments.text: So tell me a little about what brought you here today.
segments.translation: 告诉我你今天为什么来这儿。

segments.text: JULIE: Well, I've been getting a pain in my knee, the left one.
segments.translation: 朱莉：好的，我左边膝盖有点疼。

segments.text: Not very serious at first, but it's gotten worse, so I thought I ought to see someone about it.
segments.translation: 一开始不是很严重，但现在情况更糟了，所以我想我应该找个医生看看。

segments.text: CARL: That's certainly the right decision.
segments.translation: 卡尔：这当然是正确的决定。

segments.text: So how long have you been aware of this pain?
segments.translation: 你感觉到这种痛苦有多久了？

segments.text: Is it just a few days, or is it longer than that?
segments.translation: 只有几天，还是更久？

segments.text: JULIE: Longer. It's been worse for the last couple of days, but it's three weeks since I first noticed it.
segments.translation: 朱莉：更久。最近几天情况更糟了，但我最开始发现膝盖疼已经是三周以前了。

segments.text: It came on quite gradually though, so I kind of ignored it at first.
segments.translation: 它是逐渐疼起来的，所以我一开始有点忽视它。

segments.text: CARL: And have you taken any medication yourself, or treated it in anyway?
segments.translation: 卡尔：那你有没有自己服药，或者用任何方法治疗过？

segments.text: JULIE: Yeah, I've been taking medication to deal with the pain, Tylenol, and that works OK for a few hours.
segments.translation: 朱莉：有的，我一直在服用药物来缓解疼痛，泰诺，药效能持续几个小时。

segments.text: But I don't like to keep taking it.
segments.translation: 但我不喜欢一直吃那个药。

segments.text: CARL: OK. And what about heat treatment?
segments.translation: 卡尔：好的。那热治疗呢？

segments.text: Have you tried applying heat at all?
segments.translation: 你试过热敷吗？

segments.text: JULIE: No, but I have been using ice on it for the last few days.
segments.translation: 朱莉：没有，但最近几天我一直在用冰。

segments.text: CARL: And does that seem to help the pain at all?
segments.translation: 卡尔：那对疼痛有帮助吗？

segments.text: JULIE: A little, yes.
segments.translation: 朱莉：有一点儿。

segments.text: CARL: Good. Now you look as if you're quite fit normally?
segments.translation: 卡尔：很好。看起来你通常情况下都很健康对吧？

segments.text: JULIE: I am, yes.
segments.translation: 朱莉：是的。

segments.text: CARL: So do you do any sport on a regular basis?
segments.translation: 卡尔：那你有固定做什么运动吗？

segments.text: JULIE: Yes, I play a lot of tennis.
segments.translation: 朱莉：有，我经常打网球。

segments.text: I belong to a club so I go there a lot.
segments.translation: 我加入了一个俱乐部，所以经常去那里。

segments.text: I'm quite competitive so I enjoy that side of it as well as the exercise. But I haven't gone since this started.
segments.translation: 我很喜欢竞技，所以我很享受运动的竞技性和锻炼本身。但自从膝盖开始疼我就没去过了。

segments.text: CARL: Sure. And do you do any other types of exercise?
segments.translation: 卡尔：好的。你还做过其他运动吗？

segments.text: JULIE: Yeah, I sometimes do a little swimming, but usually just when I'm on vacation.
segments.translation: 朱莉：有啊，我有时也游泳，但通常只是在度假的时候。

segments.text: But normally I go running a few times a week, maybe three or four times.
segments.translation: 一般我一周会跑几次步，大概三四次。

segments.text: CARL: Hmm. So your legs are getting quite a pounding.
segments.translation: 卡尔：嗯。所以你的腿承受了挺大的冲击。

segments.text: But you haven't had any problems up to now?
segments.translation: 但到目前为止你还没有遇到任何问题吧？

segments.text: JULIE: No, not with my legs.
segments.translation: 朱莉：没有，我的腿从没出过问题。

segments.text: I did have an accident last year when I slipped and hurt my shoulder, but that's better now.
segments.translation: 去年我确实经历了一场事故，当时我滑倒了，伤到了肩膀，但现在好多了。

segments.text: CARL: Excellent. And do you have any allergies?
segments.translation: 卡尔：太好了。你有过敏症吗？

segments.text: JULIE: No, none that I'm aware of.
segments.translation: 朱莉：据我所知没有。

segments.text: CARL: And do you take any medication on a regular basis?
segments.translation: 卡尔：你有没有定期服药？

segments.text: JULIE: Well, I take vitamins but that's all I'm generally very healthy.
segments.translation: 朱莉：我只吃维生素，但大体上来说我还是很健康的。

segments.text: CARL: OK, well let's have a closer look and see what might be causing this problem.
segments.translation: 卡尔：好吧，让我们仔细看看是什么导致了这个问题。

segments.text: If you can just get up…
segments.translation: 如果你能站起来……
